page.title: Org Activity Report (2026-05-01..2026-05-31)
page.description: - Total issues/PRs: 44 - Closed issues/PRs: 28 - Average time to close: 1 day, 1836
page.bodyHtml:
• Search query: org:eunomia-bpf

Summary

  • Total issues/PRs: 44
  • Closed issues/PRs: 28
  • Average time to close: 1 day, 1836

Issues and Pull Requests

  • fix: at sslsniff in sslsniff.c — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #6 (Closed)
  • build(deps): bump tar from 0.4.44 to 0.4.46 in /ecli — eunomia-bpf/eunomia-bpf #403 (Open)
  • Bump libc from 0.2.174 to 0.2.186 in /collector — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #5 (Open)
  • Add Cloudflare Workers configuration — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #62 (Open)
  • build(deps): bump openssl from 0.10.75 to 0.10.80 in /ecli — eunomia-bpf/eunomia-bpf #402 (Open)
  • Bump clap from 4.5.41 to 4.5.60 in /collector — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #4 (Open)
  • Bump serde_json from 1.0.140 to 1.0.143 in /collector — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #3 (Open)
  • Bump tempfile from 3.20.0 to 3.27.0 in /collector — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #2 (Open)
  • Bump serde from 1.0.219 to 1.0.228 in /collector — eunomia-bpf/ActPlane #1 (Open)
  • Add Cloudflare Workers configuration — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #61 (Closed)
  • [codex] Add SQLite observability adapters and live smokes — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #60 (Closed)
  • [codex] Fix site favicon assets — eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev #94 (Closed)
  • runtime: shard software perf event producers by thread — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #575 (Open)
  • fix: enable bpf_cookie support by fixing three bugs — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #574 (Open)
  • Add Cloudflare Workers configuration — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #59 (Closed)
  • Feat/live demo — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #58 (Closed)
  • Add Cloudflare Workers configuration — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #57 (Closed)
  • fix: clean error (not panic) on bad log path; bound OtelExporter pending map — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #56 (Closed)
  • fix(syscall-server): four isolated correctness bugs in shm/syscall handlers — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #573 (Open)
  • refactor: remove dead live-streaming infra + ignored filter params (−95 LOC) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #55 (Closed)
  • refactor(shm): dedup bpf_map_* fd validation via try_get_map_handler — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #572 (Open)
  • feat: make SSEProcessor honor timeout_ms (evict idle SSE buffers) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #54 (Closed)
  • refactor: extract shared filter-metrics machinery (http/ssl) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #53 (Closed)
  • refactor: cut dead code — gate test-only items behind cfg(test), delete the rest — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #52 (Closed)
  • Fix LLVM Triple and RTTI problems — eunomia-bpf/llvmbpf #47 (Closed)
  • refactor: split main.rs (binary_resolver module) + TraceConfig to kill the param-hell — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #51 (Closed)
  • feat: Basic-block & Register tracing & Trampoline update — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #571 (Open)
  • ci: enforce clippy (-D warnings) + run C unit tests under AddressSanitizer — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #50 (Closed)
  • feat: export OpenTelemetry GenAI (gen_ai.*) spans via OTLP/HTTP — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #49 (Closed)
  • feat: out-of-the-box monitoring for containerized agents (OpenClaw) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #48 (Closed)
  • Support OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions (gen_ai.*) — zero-instrumentation OTLP export — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #47 (Closed)
  • fix: initialize bpf_link attach_cookie and validate perf target_fd (#569) — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #570 (Closed)
  • fix: auto-discover Node's static OpenSSL binary for SSL capture (#42) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #46 (Closed)
  • feat: add exec command for zero-config agent tracing — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #45 (Closed)
  • Document Next.js stack, pin Next to stable 16.2.6, fix deploy docs — eunomia-bpf/eunomia.dev #92 (Closed)
  • Sanity check: deterministic proof-bundle layer alongside AgentSight? — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #44 (Open)
  • [BUG] bpf_link_handler constructor does not initialize attach_cookie from bpf_cookie — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #569 (Closed)
  • fix: upgrade next to 15.0.5, 15.1.9, 15.2.6, 15.3.6, 15.4.8, 15.5.7, 16.0.7 (CVE-2025-55182) — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #43 (Closed)
  • fix: remove unreachable return in add_software_perf_event — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #568 (Open)
  • fix: add buffer-length check in bpf_x86_native_lab.c — eunomia-bpf/bpf-benchmark #7 (Closed)
  • ci: bound example CLI tests to avoid hangs — eunomia-bpf/bpftime #567 (Closed)
  • Failed to capture gemini-cli — eunomia-bpf/agentsight #42 (Closed)
  • build(deps): bump rpassword from 7.4.0 to 7.5.2 in /ecli — eunomia-bpf/eunomia-bpf #401 (Open)
  • build(deps): bump openssl from 0.10.75 to 0.10.79 in /ecli — eunomia-bpf/eunomia-bpf #400 (Closed)
